## Type

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] test: Tests
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] perf: Performance improvement
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes
- [ ] chore: Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `go test ./... -count=1`
- [ ] Linter passes: `golangci-lint run ./...`
- [ ] Cross-platform build: `GOOS=windows go build -o /dev/null ./cmd/ralph-engine/`
- [ ] Godoc comments on all exported symbols
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing change)
